name: canvas-mcp
description: Canvas MCP server for courses, assignments, planning, content, collaboration, and confirmed local-file submissions.
long_description: Canvas MCP is a local-first Model Context Protocol server for Canvas. It connects to a user-provided Canvas domain and bearer token, then exposes mostly read-only student-focused tools for courses, assignments, planner items, announcements, modules, files, discussions, quizzes, groups, conversations, and schedules. It also includes an explicitly confirmed local-file assignment submission tool for assignments that accept online_upload submissions.

canvas_domain.title: Canvas domain
canvas_domain.description: Canvas host name, for example canvas.northwestern.edu.

canvas_api_token.title: Canvas API token
canvas_api_token.description: Canvas bearer token used for API requests.
